name: Labrador Iron Ore Royalty Corporation
description: Labrador Iron Ore Royalty Corporation is a Canadian publicly traded company that provides investors exposure to the iron ore market through its royalty, commission, and minority equity interests in the Iron Ore Company of Canada (IOC). IOC is a leading North American producer and exporter of premium iron ore pellets and high-grade concentrate. By holding these interests, the corporation offers shareholders a unique way to participate in the financial performance of IOC's mining operations, which are managed by Rio Tinto, without the direct operational risks associated with mining activities.
